ink-950.role: primary dark field and high-contrast text

ink-700.role: light-mode secondary heading and chart label

violet-100.role: light-mode violet tint and callout surface

gold-100.role: light-mode gold tint and highlight wash

lime-100.role: light-mode lime tint and positive signal wash

stone-100.role: light surface and primary text on dark fields

stone-300.role: axes, dividers, quiet rules, secondary text on dark fields

white-000.role: paper and high-contrast light text on dark fields

display-emphasis.usage: cover titles, section openers, short pull statements

base-human.usage: optional softer marketing or people-led contexts

technical-mono.usage: charts, sources, timestamps, axes, dataset labels

surfaceRules.background: stay in one tonal family per asset
surfaceRules.textOnDark: never use black or dark ink text on deep purple surfaces; use white-000, stone-100, stone-300, gold-500, or lime-500
surfaceRules.textOnLight: use ink-950 or ink-700 for body text on paper surfaces; use violet, gold, and lime as accents, not paragraph text
surfaceRules.emphasis: use type, weight, accent, and placement before full-background changes
surfaceRules.charts: use visible light axes, restrained gridlines, light labels, and adequate padding
surfaceRules.whitespace: do not fill unless the added object is the story
